emails.subject: First Union National Bank ("FUNB")
emails.body: First Union National Bank ("FUNB") With respect to Enron Credit Ltd., please note that ENA has and executed master with FUNB. Let Susan Bailey know if you need a copy of the agreement. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 03/28/2001 10:06 AM Susan Bailey 03/28/2001 09:49 AM

emails.subject: Re: First Union National Bank ("FUNB")
emails.body: Hey, DUDE! Have you forgotten to read your Lotus Notes today? Looks like this one filtered through lots of people (since you left, multiple people fill your shoes). And where did you hear it was nice over in Houston? It's raining with a high of 54 F. But it is supposed to reach mid-70's over the weekend. I'll ask Susan B. to send you a copy. Stay tuned for the mad cow email. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Rod Nelson 03/28/2001 10:27 AM

emails.subject: Re: First Union National Bank ("FUNB")
emails.body: Re: First Union National Bank ("FUNB") Hi Sara. Who set the credit terms for this one? Let me guess me. I actually would like a copy for our files over here. It's raining. Again. I hear Houston is nice. From: Sara Shackleton on 03/28/2001 10:08 CST
